## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you want. Be specific about behaviour, not implementation. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Is this a substantive change?

If this touches the loop driver, gate-cycle contract, or methodology rules, it will
need a Specfuse feature folder (`.specfuse/features/`). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
for the full workflow.

- [ ] Yes — I am prepared to open an issue and discuss scope before coding
- [ ] No — this is a config / doc / cosmetic change

## Additional context

<!-- Links, prior art, related issues. -->
